items.title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
items.summary: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

items.title: Senra Systems Receives $65M Series B Round
items.summary: CYPRESS, CA, Senra Systems today announced it has raised $65 million in a Series B funding round and plans to accelerate its expansion with a third factory location.
